identity.name: The Modern Arborist
identity.persona: Professional Landscape Architect meets Swiss Utility

typography.pairing_logic: Geometric headings for modern feel, legible humanist sans for body to ensure readability in sunlight.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - Trust, Nature, Professionalism

background.description: Bone White - Reduces glare, feels organic

grid_strategy.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6
grid_strategy.card: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 p-5 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

mobile_optimization.thumb_zone: Fixed bottom bar for primary actions (Save, Add) with z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur border-t border-slate-200 p-4
mobile_optimization.touch_targets: min-h-[56px] (h-14) for all inputs and buttons
mobile_optimization.safe_area: pb-24 (bottom padding to avoid content behind fixed bars)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B3A24] text-white hover:bg-[#2C5530] h-14 rounded-lg font-medium shadow-sm active:scale-[0.98] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FDFBF7] text-[#1B3A24] border border-[#1B3A24] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] h-14 rounded-lg font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-[#1B3A24] hover:bg-slate-100 h-10 px-4 rounded-md

inputs.base: h-14 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1B3A24]/20 focus:border-[#1B3A24] transition-all text-base
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5

cards.quote_summary: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-5 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
cards.service_item: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-lg border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 transition-colors

icons.usage: Use icons for every menu item and action button to aid quick recognition.

image_style.filters: brightness-105 contrast-95 saturate-90 (slightly desaturated organic look)

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds is White or Very Dark Slate. No Grey on Green.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be at least 44x44px (managed via h-14 classes).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring using standard Tailwind outline-none ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#1B3A24]

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Force Light Mode. The app is for outdoor use; dark mode is hard to read in sunlight.
3. LANGUAGE: All hardcoded text MUST be in ITALIAN (e.g., 'Preventivo' not 'Quote', 'Clienti' not 'Customers').
5. STATE: Use 'zustand' or 'react-query' for state management if needed, but local state is fine for MVP.
6. PDF: Use '@react-pdf/renderer' or 'jspdf' for generating the quote PDF.
7. MOBILE: Always verify the design looks good on 375px width (iPhone SE size). Use 'w-full' for almost everything.
8. FORM: Use 'react-hook-form' + 'zod' for validation (Italian error messages).
9. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all inputs, buttons, and major containers.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts for forms; left-align labels.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-6 instead of p-3).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
